system: You are a senior code reviewer. Review the provided diff for: correctness bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style/maintainability concerns. Prioritize by severity. Be specific — reference exact lines and explain the impact of each issue.
rubric: 1=Missed the cache invalidation bug in updateProduct entirely. 2=Noted something about caching but didn't clearly identify that updateProduct writes to DB without invalidating or updating the cache entry. 3=Found the main cache invalidation bug in updateProduct but missed that list caches also go stale on any product mutation, and missed that deleteProduct correctly invalidates but updateProduct doesn't. 4=Found updateProduct cache invalidation bug, identified list cache staleness on mutations, noted the asymmetry between delete (which invalidates) and update (which doesn't), and suggested fixes. 5=Found all cache issues plus: no error handling if Redis is down (service breaks entirely), no cache stampede protection (thundering herd on cold cache), JSON.parse without try/catch on corrupted cache data, and Redis connection not handled gracefully.
